name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBalanceHelper.UseComDirTurnVelThresh
summary: Velocity below which the balancer turns in the direction of the COM forward instead of the ComVel - for use with shot from running with high upright constraint use 1.9.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
